feat.name: Dragon Shape
feat.text: You can take on the shape of some of the world’s most fearsome creatures. Add the shapes listed in *dragon form* to your untamed form list. Whenever you’re polymorphed into another form using untamed form, you gain resistance 5 to your choice of bludgeoning or poison.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.
